VariableFolder.h
1 // -*- C++ -*-
2 #ifndef LAW_VARIABLE_VARIABLEFOLDER_H
3 #define LAW_VARIABLE_VARIABLEFOLDER_H
4 /* Author : desrozis at Thu Mar 26 09:54:51 2015
5  * Generated by createNew
6  */
7 
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ArcGeoSim.h"
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/Contribution/Utils/Traits.h"
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/VariableManager.h"
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Gump/UserProperty.h"
12 
13 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 
16 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
17 
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 // should be extended
21 // for instance Transportable = 2 as add beahviour eq Transportable eq WithDerivative && Transportable
22 //
23 enum eVariableProperties
24 {
25  Single = 0,
26  WithDerivative = 1
27 };
28 
29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
31 
32 template<ContainerKind::eType CK, ItemKind::eType IK>
33 struct SupportDefined { enum { value = false }; };
34 
35 template<>
36 struct SupportDefined<ContainerKind::Scalar,ItemKind::None> { enum { value = true }; };
37 
38 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
39 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
40 
41 template<typename T, typename V>
42 void fill(T& t, V v) { t.fill(v); }
43 
44 template<typename T>
45 void fill(Arcane::VariableRefScalarT<T>& t, T v) { t = v; }
46 
47 template<Gump::Dimension D, typename T>
48 auto cast(Gump::PropertyT<D,T> const& p)
49 {
50  using LawPropertyType = typename GumpToLaw< Gump::PropertyT<D,T> >::type;
51  return LawPropertyType(p.uniqueId(), p.fullName());
52 }
53 
54 template<typename E>
55 Law::ScalarRealProperty cast(Gump::UserProperty<E> const& p)
56 {
57  return Law::ScalarRealProperty(p.uniqueId(), p.fullName());
58 }
59 
60 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
61 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
62 
63 template<ContainerKind::eType CK, ItemKind::eType IK>
64 class VariableFolder
65 {
66 public:
67 
68  typedef typename SupportTraits<IK>::Type Support;
69  typedef typename AccessorTraits<CK,IK>::Type Accessor;
70 
71 public:
72 
73  VariableFolder(Arcane::String key, Arcane::IMesh* mesh)
74  : m_support_is_defined(SupportDefined<CK,IK>::value)
75  , m_key(key)
76  , m_variables(mesh)
77  {
78  m_variables.disableVerbosity();
79  }
80 
81  ~VariableFolder() {}
82 
83  const Arcane::String& key() const { return m_key; }
84 
85  void setSupport(Support support)
86  {
87  if(m_support_is_defined)
88  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("support is already defined");
89 
90  m_support = support;
91 
92  m_support_is_defined = true;
93  }
94 
95  void forceSupport(Support support)
96  {
97  m_support = support;
98 
99  m_support_is_defined = true;
100  }
101 
102  const Support& support() const
103  {
104  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_support_is_defined),("support is not defined"));
105 
106  return m_support;
107  }
108 
109  bool contains(const Gump::Property& p) const
110  {
111  return lawVariableAccessor().contains(p);
112  }
113 
114  template<Gump::Dimension D, typename T>
115  void addVariable(Gump::PropertyT<D,T> p, eVariableProperties desc = Single)
116  {
117  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_support_is_defined),("support is not defined"));
118 
119  auto flag = (desc & WithDerivative) ? Law::eWithDerivative : Law::eWithoutDerivative;
120 
121  auto allocator = Law::allocator<CK,IK>(cast(p), flag, m_support, m_key);
122 
123  m_variables << allocator;
124 
125  // Pour les Nan
126  // On ne remplit que ce qui n'existait pas
127  if(allocator->firstAllocation())
128  _fillZero(p);
129 
130  }
131 
132  template<typename E>
133  void addVariable(Gump::UserProperty<E> p, eVariableProperties desc = Single)
134  {
135  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_support_is_defined),("support is not defined"));
136 
137  auto flag = (desc & WithDerivative) ? Law::eWithDerivative : Law::eWithoutDerivative;
138 
139  auto allocator = Law::allocator<CK,IK>(cast(p), flag, m_support, m_key);
140 
141  m_variables << allocator;
142 
143  // Pour les Nan
144  // On ne remplit que ce qui n'existait pas
145  if(allocator->firstAllocation())
146  _fillZero(cast(p));
147 
148  }
149 
150  template<Gump::Dimension D, typename T>
151  void _fillZero(Gump::PropertyT<D,T> p)
152  {
153  auto accessor = lawVariableAccessor();
154  auto& v = accessor.values(cast(p));
155  fill(v, T(0));
156  }
157 
158  void addVariable(const Arcane::Array<Gump::ScalarRealProperty>& p, eVariableProperties desc = Single)
159  {
160  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_support_is_defined),("support is not defined"));
161 
162  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < p.size(); ++i)
163  addVariable(p[i], desc);
164  }
165 
166  template<typename E>
167  void addVariable(const Arcane::Array< Gump::UserProperty<E> >& p, eVariableProperties desc = Single)
168  {
169  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_support_is_defined),("support is not defined"));
170 
171  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < p.size(); ++i)
172  addVariable(p[i], desc);
173  }
174 
175  Accessor lawVariableAccessor() const
176  {
177  return AccessorTraits<CK,IK>::accessor(m_variables);
178  }
179 
180  const Law::VariableManager& lawVariableManager() const
181  {
182  return m_variables;
183  }
184 
185  void enableVerbosity()
186  {
187  m_variables.enableVerbosity();
188  }
189 
190  void disableVerbosity()
191  {
192  m_variables.disableVerbosity();
193  }
194 
195 public:
196 
197  bool m_support_is_defined;
198 
199  Arcane::String m_key;
200 
201  Support m_support;
202 
203  Law::VariableManager m_variables;
204 };
205 
206 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
207 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
208 
209 typedef Law::VariableFolder<Law::ContainerKind::Variable,
210  Law::ItemKind::Cell> VariableCellFolder;
211 
212 typedef Law::VariableFolder<Law::ContainerKind::Variable,
213  Law::ItemKind::Node> VariableNodeFolder;
214 
215 typedef Law::VariableFolder<Law::ContainerKind::PartialVariable,
216  Law::ItemKind::Cell> PartialVariableCellFolder;
217 
218 typedef Law::VariableFolder<Law::ContainerKind::PartialVariable,
219  Law::ItemKind::Face> PartialVariableFaceFolder;
220 
221 typedef Law::VariableFolder<Law::ContainerKind::Scalar,
222  Law::ItemKind::None> ScalarFolder;
223 
224 
225 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
226 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
227 
228 template<ContainerKind::eType CK, ItemKind::eType IK>
229 struct FolderTraits
230 {
231  typedef AccessorTraits<CK,IK> AccessorTraitsType;
232  typedef typename AccessorTraitsType::Type Accessor;
233  typedef typename ValuesContainerTraits<CK,IK>::Type Values;
234  typedef typename DerivativesContainerTraits<CK,IK>::Type Derivatives;
235  typedef typename ContributionContainerTraits<CK,IK>::Type Contributions;
236 };
237 
238 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
239 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
240 
241 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
242

246 #endif /* LAW_VARIABLE_VARIABLEFOLDER_H */
